commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway WebSocket backend self-pairing so shared token/password auth no longer preserves self-declared operator.admin scopes without device identity, and adds focused gateway auth tests.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +29. Total +43 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows a no-Origin local or shared-secret-loopback backend client with shared token/password auth sets skipLocalBackendSelfPairing, and the compat baseline currently expects operator.admin to be preserved.
commands.review_followup: Gateway security/product owners need to decide the shared-secret backend trust boundary, and the contributor still needs real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(gateway): clear admin scopes for backend self-pairing
target.body:
Summary
- Stop treating shared token/password auth as sufficient to preserve self-declared `operator.admin` scopes for local backend self-pairing.
- Keep existing lower-privilege backend local flows intact, while clearing admin scopes for device-less backend shared-auth connects.
- Add explicit issue proof coverage for loopback/no-Origin backend identity + shared token/password + `operator.admin` + no device identity.

Real proof
- Reproduction is now encoded in `src/gateway/server.auth.compat-baseline.test.ts`:
  - open a loopback WebSocket with no browser `Origin`
  - send `client.id = gateway-client`, `client.mode = backend`
  - authenticate with the shared token/password
  - request `scopes = ["operator.admin"]`
  - omit device identity
  - assert hello-ok returns no scopes and an admin RPC (`set-heartbeats`) is rejected with `missing scope`
- Additional control coverage in `src/gateway/server.auth.control-ui.suite.ts` exercises the same backend identity path across default, remote-looking, and private host headers.

Verification
```text
$ ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/handshake-auth-helpers.test.ts src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server.auth.compat-baseline.test.ts src/gateway/server.auth.control-ui.test.ts src/gateway/server.silent-scope-upgrade-reconnect.poc.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-invoke-approval-bypass.test.ts

Test Files  6 passed (6)
Tests  177 passed (177)
```

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#72418
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
